title: Aurora 60324 Lying Scotty Dog Soft Toy, 15 Centimeter, Black
description: Aurora World’s highly popular Mini Flopsies range brings you an extremely cute and cuddly Scotty Dog. Made using the finest plush materials, this black Scotty Dog has a floppy bean bag body and is perfect as a gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.Do not miss the opportunity to have the highest quality and excellent production, which meets all the required regulations.
